headline: Three Mile Island Delays Test Constellation Energy’s Nuclear Growth And Valuation
summary: Constellation Energy (NasdaqGS:CEG) faces material operational uncertainty tied to the planned restart of the Three Mile Island nuclear plant. Key transmission projects linked to the restart are experiencing setbacks that could delay the plant coming back online. The restart timeline also depends on federal regulatory waivers, adding another layer of uncertainty for the project. Constellation Energy operates as a major producer of carbon free power, and the Three Mile Island restart is part...
